description: Make bare `go` resolve loose/direct commands versus repo-local .go execution: detect target repo, repair missing contract, create task from intent, or enter autonomous loop.
acceptance: Router distinguishes loose/simple work from repo-local .go work without making Viggo choose subcommands.
When .go exists, the router requires vision/principles/hierarchy/task/goal before execution.
When no task exists but intent is actionable, the router creates a scoped task instead of asking for another go.

evidence.summary: Added bare  CLI universal router that distinguishes missing repo/missing .go/invalid contract from repo-local execution, creates a scoped task from actionable intent when no open task exists, returns go-auto/go-loop plan, and has regression test; verification: pytest -q 10 passed; make check passed
